---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new objective, verifier, algorithm, or capability
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What you want**
The capability you'd like — e.g. a new objective / verifier / algorithm / recipe.

**Why**
The use case it unblocks. Link a paper if it implements a known method.

**Sketch (optional)**
How it might fit the `data → objective → algorithm` model and the registry
(`@register(...)`).
